stamp.title: USA 1861 1c Benjamin Franklin, Blue
stamp.summary: United States 1861-1866 series Benjamin Franklin 1c blue. Left stamp in a comparison of shades. Unused with bright color. Perf 12. Dealer notes indicate no watermark, which is consistent with this issue.

stamp.title: USA 1861 1c Benjamin Franklin, Dull Blue
stamp.summary: United States 1861-1866 series Benjamin Franklin 1c blue. Right stamp showing a duller or more grayish-blue shade variation. Unused. Perf 12.
